title: PROCESSINGINST
text: PROCESSINGINST Operation activated by the SAX parser when a processing instruction is encountered. Explain this code operation PROCESSINGINST params string Target: in string Data: in endparams Implement your code here end; PROCESSINGINST operation Copy Parameters Target Data Description Processing instructions specify application-specific data, similar to #pragma for C compilers. A processing instruction has the format <?target data?/> . The target is returned in the parameter Target , the rest up to the closing ?/> is returned in parameter Data . Was this topic helpful?
